scenario: Restricting API access by IP range

input.functional_requirement: API should only be accessible from 10.0.0.0/8 range.
input.risk_factors: Exposure to public internet, data exfiltration.

evaluation_criteria: policy mentions IP range or CIDR notation

input.functional_requirement: Any 'delete_user' action must have 2FA verified in the session.
input.risk_factors: Account takeover leading to mass data deletion.
